name: mummy-daddy-pos
description: POS System for Mummy and Daddy Business - Uganda Shillings

scripts.dev: npm run dev -w packages/web & npm run dev -w packages/server
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/web & npm run build -w packages/desktop & npm run build -w packages/mobile
scripts.install-all: npm install && npm install -w packages/web && npm install -w packages/desktop && npm install -w packages/mobile && npm install -w packages/server && npm install -w packages/shared

author: MacMaron78
